title: Minister Response: COSEWIC species at risk assessments - January 2026 - Canada.ca
content:
## Minister Response: COSEWIC species at risk assessments - January 2026
Official title: The Minister of the Environment's Response to Species at Risk Assessments submitted by the Committee on the Status of Endangered Wildlife in Canada (COSEWIC) on October 16, 2025

## Table 1. Terrestrial species assessed by COSEWIC and eligible for addition to Schedule 1 of the Species at Risk Act (8 species) Normal consultations: until May 14, 2026; Extended consultations: until October 14, 2026
Short-billed Dowitcher caurinus subspecies
Limnodromus griseus caurinus
Cupped Fringe Lichen
Heterodermia hypoleuca
Circular-leaved Peat Moss
Sphagnum cyclophyllum
Short-billed Dowitcher hendersoni/griseus
Limnodromus griseus hendersoni/griseus
NT, AB, SK, MB, ON, QC, NB, NS, PE, NL, NU
YT, NT, NU, BC, AB, SK, MB, ON, QC, NB, NS, PE, NL
